evidence.rationale: close route aggregates sales_log rows where payment_method ~ /^cash$/i; the test re-runs the same query and asserts equality.
ar_pipeline unwinds invoice.payments and matches by payments.date == today, independent of order_date.
new_credit aggregates invoices.balance filtered on order_date==today; yesterday's invoice has order_date=yesterday.
